qa_pairs.question: What information should you configure when starting to develop on a new system with Git?
qa_pairs.answer: When developing on a new system with Git, you should configure your name and email address.

qa_pairs.question: What is the importance of configuring your name and email address in Git?
qa_pairs.answer: Your name and email address will be associated with every commit you make in Git.

qa_pairs.question: Will the name and email configured in Git be public?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, if you push your revisions to a public repository, your configured name and email address will become public.

qa_pairs.question: What lesson is this section on configuring the global Git environment based on?
qa_pairs.answer: This section is based on the Software Carpentry lesson titled 'Version Control with Git'.
